title: Pseudo Organism Mod (伪生物模组)
description: This is a world invaded by pseudo-creatures.
body: This is a world invaded by pseudo organisms.In the current version, you can use diamond resources to make blue crystal equipment.This is a very complex process, you need to kill multiple withered creatures to create a pseudo energy core, which can upgrade the Blue Crystal equipment again.In the next version, pseudo creatures and new dimensions will be gradually added to the mod. Please look forward to it!
